message.content:
The terminal is not responding properly - commands are echoed but not executed. Ctrl+C is being typed literally. Let me try sending C-c without newline as a special key sequence.

{"analysis":"Terminal stuck - no prompt, commands echoed but not executed. Need to interrupt the running process properly using the special key sequence.","plan":"Send Ctrl+C as a special key to interrupt, then check terminal state.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"C-c","duration":2.0}]}
